name: Temporary Static Publisher
description: Publishes HTML, Markdown, or prebuilt static-site ZIPs at immutable URLs for exactly 30 days.
instructions: Publish the build output, not project source. Send one POST to /api/v1/publish and return the response url and expiresAt to the user.
constraints: Static output only; uploaded code is not executed.
ZIP archives must contain index.html at the root.
Always use the URL returned by the publish response.
